ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly identifies the figure as Android 18. Union Force is an official Bandai-licensed DBS TCG product. Android 18 (originally named Lazuli) is a canonical Dragon Ball Z character — internal Toei Animation / Bird Studio IP. No external crossover risk; no IP callout block required.

trivia_bullets.text: IP verified: The card name 'Twin Sister Android 18' directly identifies the depicted figure. Android 18's birth name is Lazuli — the older twin sister to Lapis (Android 17). Both were human juvenile delinquents forcibly converted into cyborgs by Dr. Gero [WebSearch: Android 17 Android 18 Dragon Ball Z Dr Gero twins Lapis Lazuli]. The gemstone naming pun (Lapis Lazuli) is a canonical Akira Toriyama naming convention.
sources: WebSearch: Android 17 Android 18 Dragon Ball Z Dr Gero twins Lapis Lazuli Cell absorption

trivia_bullets.text: After the Cell Saga, Android 18 married Krillin — a relationship that Toriyama described by noting that 18 'found Krillin's seriousness and straightforwardness refreshing, and somehow or other she ended up falling for him' [WebSearch: Android 18 Krillin marriage Dragon Ball Z; Screen Rant citing Toriyama]. They had a daughter, Marron, and remained a stable couple through Dragon Ball Super. Krillin's connection to Android 18 makes her a stewardship-relevant figure for a potential future Krillin character node.
sources: WebSearch: Android 18 marries Krillin Dragon Ball Z Cell Saga ending Lazuli

trivia_bullets.text: Android 18 (BT2-091) and Android 17 (BT2-089) share consecutive card numbers in Union Force with mirrored 'Twin Sister / Twin Brother' title structure — a designer-coordinated dyad encoding both halves of the canonical sibling pair in adjacent slots [Scryfall-analog: collector_numbers BT2-089 and BT2-091]. This is the closest thing in the BBL corpus to an explicitly packaged mechanical-and-narrative pair at the card-number level.

related_cards.name: Twin Brother Android 17
related_cards.note: Canonical sibling pair; card no. BT2-089 — consecutive numbers encode the dyad

related_cards.name: Krillin, the Fighter
related_cards.note: Future spouse of Android 18; stewardship node candidate

related_cards.name: Cell, the Gifted
related_cards.note: Cell absorbed Android 18 to achieve Perfect form — she was later expelled alive
